basic_details.job_title: SIDHKO FED Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 72 District Manager and District Project Manager Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Sidho-Kanho Agriculture and Forest Produce State Co-Operative Federation (SIDHKO FED)
basic_details.short_information: Sidho-Kanho Agriculture and Forest Produce State Co-Operative Federation (SIDHKO FED) District Level Professionals Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of SIDHKO FED. A total of 72 vacancies have been announced through the SIDHKO FED District Level Professionals Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: General/EWS 35 Years; EBC (Male) 37 Years; BC (Male) 37 Years; Female (General/EWS/EBC/BC) 38 Years; SC/ST (Male & Female) 40 Years

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors/Masters in HR/Agriculture/Horticulture/Management/Social Work/Rural Development/Agriculture and allied, B.Com or Certification in taxation/Accountancy
qualification.details: District Project Manager: Bachelors/Masters (preferred) in HR/Agriculture/Horticulture, Management/Social Work/Rural Development/Agriculture and allied from reputed institutions. District Manager-(Production & Storage): Bachelors/Masters (preferred) in Agriculture/Horticulture, Management/Social Work/Rural Development/Agriculture and allied. District Manager-(MIS & Accounts): Bachelors/Masters in B.Com or Certification in taxation, Accountancy.

salary_details.details: District Project Manager: Rs. 50000/- per month District Manager-(Production & Storage): Rs. 40000/- per month District Manager-(MIS & Accounts): Rs. 35000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SIDHKO FED Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SIDHKO FED to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.sidho_kanho_agriculture_and_forest_produ: Bachelors/Masters in HR/Agriculture/Horticulture/Management/Social Work/Rural Development/Agriculture and allied, B.Com or Certification in taxation/Accountancy

content_sections.heading: SIDHKO FED Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the SIDHKO FED Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download SIDHKO FED Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SIDHKO FED Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: District Project Manager: Bachelors/Masters (preferred) in HR/Agriculture/Horticulture, Management/Social Work/Rural Development/Agriculture and allied from reputed institutions. District Manager-(Production & Storage): Bachelors/Masters (preferred) in Agriculture/Horticulture, Management/Social Work/Rural Development/Agriculture and allied. District Manager-(MIS & Accounts): Bachelors/Masters in B.Com or Certification in taxation, Accountancy.

content_sections.heading: SIDHKO FED Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: General/EWS 35 Years; EBC (Male) 37 Years; BC (Male) 37 Years; Female (General/EWS/EBC/BC) 38 Years; SC/ST (Male & Female) 40 Years

content_sections.heading: SIDHKO FED Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: District Project Manager: Rs. 50000/- per month District Manager-(Production & Storage): Rs. 40000/- per month District Manager-(MIS & Accounts): Rs. 35000/- per month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SIDHKO FED Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SIDHKO FED to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies released by SIDHKO FED?
faq.answer: SIDHKO FED has released a total of 72 vacancies for the District Level Professionals posts. These vacancies are distributed among three different positions.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for the SIDHKO FED recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the SIDHKO FED recruitment is 10-07-2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the District Level Professionals posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all posts is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, including Bachelors/Masters in HR, Agriculture, Horticulture, Management, Social Work, Rural Development, Agriculture and allied, or B.Com with a certification in taxation/accountancy.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the District Level Professionals?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 35,000 to Rs. 50,000 per month, depending on the specific post and responsibilities.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the SIDHKO FED recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of SIDHKO FED. The application process involves filling out the form, uploading documents, and paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 400/-. For SC/ST candidates, the fee is Rs. 300/-.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will include a Written Examination, followed by an Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment for District Level Professionals posts is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article or from the official website of SIDHKO FED.
